title: heatExchanger operation
description: Two-stream heat exchanger solved by the effectiveness-NTU method. From the area, overall coefficient U and flow arrangement it computes the outlet temperatures, the duty Q and the LMTD.

area.title: Heat-transfer area
area.description: Exchanger surface area; larger area raises NTU.

U.title: Overall heat-transfer coefficient
U.description: Overall U for the surface (film, wall and fouling lumped). NTU = U·area / C_min.
